library.description: Working reference list for the warming and intertidal community thesis, plus the nature writing shelf I keep for the rainy months.

reference.title: The Reef's Memory
reference.author: Lila Akana
reference.note: A marine biologist returns to a reef she studied a decade earlier. The warm water analog of what I watch in cold water.

reference.title: The Sea Around Us
reference.author: Rachel Carson
reference.note: Still the clearest writing about why the ocean behaves the way it does.

reference.title: Between Pacific Tides
reference.author: Edward Ricketts and Jack Calvin
reference.note: The in field species reference we keep in the kit. Cited in the methods chapter.

reference.title: Marine heatwaves and rocky shore community reorganization
reference.author: Holloway, T. and Fields, R.

reference.title: Non-metric multidimensional scaling for community ecologists
reference.author: Pereira, M. and Osei, K.
reference.note: My methods backbone for the ordination in Chapter 3.

reference.title: Sea star wasting and the lingering footprint on Pisaster populations
reference.author: Daugherty, L.
reference.note: Explains why my sea star counts stay low and noisy.
